programmes.show_description: Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
7/10. Marcus brings in new apple trees to the orchard and cooks his favourite dessert, tarte Tatin.
It is March, and Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn greet the long-awaited arrival of spring. It is time to bring in the daffodil harvest.
16/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Caroline Hawley, Gary Barton and Nessa Doran O'Reilly head to Whitchurch.

It's April and the fishing season has arrived. Alex and Peter go to sea in an Edwardian trawler. Ruth stays ashore and prepares potted shrimp.
1/8. Suffolk boatyard specialists Mary and Simon's dream is a futuristic aquatic pod. They're experts in their aquatic field, but have they taken on more than they can handle?
Dave is in Gosport knocking down an internal wall to turn a property's outside toilet into a cloakroom. 7/20
Dave is in Wellington helping a couple revamp the bathroom in their new home by fitting a stylish new suite.8/20
3/8. Revealing the shocking sugar content of some smoothies. What is meant by freshly-baked by supermarket breads. Comparing fresh and frozen food.

Kevin McNally stars as Porthos, one of the Three Musketeers, in this award-winning short drama.
Swinging London, 1969. Zooming around London in his E-type Jaguar, Peter is an arrogant womaniser who picks up a variety of dolly birds. Contains sex scenes.
In 18th-century England, a farmer finds a deformed skull, sparking a sinister influence over the village's youth, who fall under the grip of a demonic force. Contains distressing scenes.

33/35. Charlie and Chris are in Cheadle to design a safe garden for pastor and PhD student Joy to relax, read, entertain, study and pray in.
8/10. A visit to Marcus's native Lancashire inspires him to introduce some rare breed sheep, and he gets a lesson in growing spices from chilli enthusiast Mothin.
With Empire Day approaching, a paddle steamer comes to the valley. The team pull out all the stops to put on a party for the tourists, including making clotted cream and scones.
2/8. Alan and Val put their savings on the line for a high-tech boat to help them spend time with their family. But first they need to learn how to live on the water.
DIY expert Dave Wellman prepares to repair and replaster a bedroom ceiling in a family home in Essex. 9/20
Dave is in Worcestershire, widening access to a couple's property by building a concrete platform and new gateway. 10/20
4/8. Stefan goes on a crash vegan diet for a month. Are veggie ready meals better for you? The surprising truth about imported vs home grown apples.

An apparently respectable middle-class housewife controls a select group of attractive women who moonlight as hired assassins. Rula Lenska stars. Contains nudity.
